head: Math
title: Quant Finance
text: This course is designed to develop quantitative skills that students require to implement financial theories. As an ever-increasing number of financial services firms are applying sophisticated mathematical models in their trading, pricing, risk and asset management functions, the need for more specialized and advanced courses has emerged where students and working professionals can acquire the knowledge they need to competently and responsibly perform these functions. This course can be considered as a first course in this stream.

modules.title: Module 0 - Review of Probability, Differential Equations and Linear Algebra
Module 1 - Understanding Randomness Random walks, Brownian motion and Wiener process
